prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant, Gen IV small-block) forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12psi, 700+ hp at the wheels), paired with a custom-built LSX intake manifold and ID1000 fuel injectors for E85 compatibility

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop heavy-duty 9.5-inch differential with 3.73:1 gearing, upgraded axles (Mark Williams 35-spline), and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for LS3 torque management

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for HSV chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 690R series) for subframe and control arms
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-WORKS HSV Clubsport kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts), paired with a Vortex Generators rear wing for high-speed stability

Engine bay aesthetics: Carbon fiber LS3 engine cover (Seibon), custom-fabricated aluminum radiator support, and a full AN-6 braided line conversion (Earl's Performance) for coolant and power steering systems

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs), custom HSV-specific bolt-in roll cage (Chassisworks 8.5-point), and a MoTeC C127 dash logger integrated into the A-pillar for real-time data monitoring
